member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.TransUnit
member.summary: Represents a trans-unit element in an XLF (XML Localization Interchange File Format) file.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.TransUnit.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this translation unit.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.TransUnit.Translate
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this unit should be translated.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.TransUnit.XmlSpace
member.summary: Gets or sets the xml:space attribute value (typically "preserve").

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.TransUnit.Source
member.summary: Gets or sets the source text (original language). The setter automatically decodes, trims, and HTML-encodes the value.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.TransUnit.Target
member.summary: Gets or sets the target text (translated language). The setter automatically decodes, trims, and HTML-encodes the value.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.TransUnit.TransUnitTagName
member.summary: The XML tag name for trans-unit elements.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.TransUnit.ToString(SunamoDevCode._public.SunamoInterfaces.Interfaces.IXmlGeneratorDC)
member.summary: Converts this trans-unit to an XML string representation.
member.param: XML generator to use for creating the XML.
member.returns: XML string representation of the trans-unit.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XlfData
member.summary: Represents data from an XLF (XML Localization Interchange File Format) file including trans-units and metadata.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XlfData.Path
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path to the XLF file.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XlfData.Group
member.summary: Gets or sets the group XML element.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XlfData.XmlDocument
member.summary: Gets or sets the XML document.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XlfData.TransUnits
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of trans-unit XML elements.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XlfData.AllIds
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of all translation unit IDs.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XlfData.FillIds
member.summary: Fills the AllIds list with IDs from all trans-units.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat
member.summary: Provides methods for working with XLIFF (XML Localisation Interchange File Format) files used in Sunamo projects.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.CopyKeysTrailedWith_
member.summary: Copies XLF keys that are trailed with underscore, cleaning up HTML entity suffixes.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.TrimValueIfNot(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Trims whitespace from the start and end of an XML element's value if present.
member.param: XML element to trim.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetLastLetter(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Gets the last character from a trans-unit's target value.
member.param: Trans-unit XML element.
member.returns: Last character or null if target is empty.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetLastLetter(System.Xml.Linq.XElement,System.String@)
member.summary: Gets the last character from a trans-unit's target value and outputs the trans-unit ID.
member.param: Trans-unit XML element.
Output parameter for the trans-unit ID.
member.returns: Last character or null if target is empty.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetTarget(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Gets the target XML element from a trans-unit.
member.param: Trans-unit XML element.
member.returns: Target XML element.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.SourceTarget(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Gets the source and target XML elements from a trans-unit. Item1 is source, Item2 is target.
member.param: Trans-unit XML element.
member.returns: Tuple of source (Item1) and target (Item2) elements.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.TrimUnallowedChars(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Trim whitespaces from start/end

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetKeysInCsWithoutRLDataEn(System.String@,System.String)
member.summary: Gets XLF keys from C# code without RLData.en prefix.
member.param: Reference parameter for the current key being processed.
C# file content to search.
member.returns: List of unique keys found in the content.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetKeysInCsWithRLDataEn(System.String@,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets XLF keys from C# code with RLData.en prefix. To be able to be found with this method, keys must be wrapped with XlfKeys and Translate.FromKey or RLData.en. The file parameter is here only due to breakpoint for certain files.
member.param: Reference parameter for the current key being processed.
C# file content to search.
Optional file path for debugging purposes.
member.returns: List of unique keys found in the content.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReturnEndingOn(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.param: Path to the XLF file to process.
List of last-letter patterns to match.
member.returns: Tuple of report text and list of matching trans-unit IDs.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceForWithoutUnderscore(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Before mu
member.param: Logger instance.
Folder path to search for CS files.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetFilesCs(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all .cs files from the given path recursively.
member.param: Logger instance.
Path to search (optional).
member.returns: List of .cs file paths.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceInXlfSolutions(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Is calling in XlfManager.WhichStartEndWithNonDigitNumber
member.param: Logger instance.
Replacement pairs in ReplaceMany format.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetAllLastLetterFromEnd(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Is used nowhere Was in MainWindow but probably was replaced with GetAllLastLetterFromEnd
member.param: Path to the XLF file.
Whether to save distinct last letters to clipboard.
member.returns: List of trans-unit IDs.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.RemoveFromXlfWhichHaveEmptyTargetOrSource(System.String,SunamoDevCode.Enums.XlfParts,SunamoDevCode.Args.RemoveFromXlfWhichHaveEmptyTargetOrSourceArgs)
member.summary: Into A1 insert XlfResourcesH.PathToXlfSunamo Completely IUN Remove completely whole Trans-unit
member.param: Path to the XLF file to process.
Which XLF part (Source or Target) to check for empty values.
Options controlling removal behavior (defaults to Default if null).
member.returns: String representation of the modified XML document.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.TrimStringResources(System.String)
member.summary: Trim whitespaces from start/end on source / target A1 is possible to obtain with XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetLangFromFilename
member.param: Path to the XLF file to trim.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetTransUnits(System.String)
member.summary: A1 is possible to obtain with XlfResourcesH.PathToXlfSunamo
member.param: Path to the XLF file to parse.
member.returns: XlfData containing the parsed trans-units and XML document.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.Append(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.param: Source text for the translation unit.
Target text for the translation unit.
Pascal case identifier used as the trans-unit ID.
Path to the XLF file to append to.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.Append(System.String,System.String,SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XlfData)
member.summary: Appends a new trans-unit element with the specified target text and ID to the XLF data group.
member.param: Target text for the translation unit.
Pascal case identifier used as the trans-unit ID.
XLF data containing the group to append to.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.RemoveFromXlfAndXlfKeys(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Removes trans-units from both XLF file and XLF keys by matching IDs.
member.param: Path to the XLF file.
List of ID endings to match for removal.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.FromXlfWithDiacritic(System.String,SunamoDevCode.Enums.XlfParts,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets trans-unit IDs or targets from XLF file that contain diacritics.
member.param: Path to the XLF file.
Which part of the trans-unit to check (Id or Target).
Reserved for clipboard functionality.
member.returns: List of trans-unit IDs that contain diacritics.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.RemoveFromXlfAndXlfKeys(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},SunamoDevCode.Enums.XlfParts)
member.summary: Removes specified trans-units from the XLF file and corresponding constants from XlfKeys.
member.param: Path to the XLF file.
List of IDs or target values to remove.
Which part to match against (Id or Target).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.RemoveDuplicatesInXlfFile(System.String)
member.summary: Removes duplicate trans-units from an XLF file, keeping only the first occurrence of each ID.
member.param: Path to the XLF file to deduplicate.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetIds(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all trans-unit IDs from an XLF file along with the parsed XLF data.
member.param: Path to the XLF file.
member.returns: OutRef containing list of IDs and the parsed XlfData.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceStringKeysWithXlfKeys(System.String)
member.summary: Replaces string keys with XLF keys in all C# files under the given path.
member.param: Root directory to scan for C# files.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceStringKeysWithXlfKeys(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Replaces string-based SessI18n keys with XlfKeys dot notation in all given files.
member.param: List of file paths to process.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceStringKeysWithXlfKeysWorker(System.String@,System.String)
member.summary: Worker method that performs the actual replacement of SessI18n keys with XlfKeys format in content.
member.param: Output: the last processed key.
Source code content to process.
member.returns: Modified content with replaced keys.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.GetSunamoStrings
member.summary: Gets a list of SunamoStrings keys with the SessI18n and XlfKeys prefixes removed.
member.returns: List of cleaned string keys.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceSunamoStringsWithSessI18n(System.String)
member.summary: Replaces SunamoStrings references with SessI18n format in the given text.
member.param: Source text to process.
member.returns: Text with SunamoStrings replaced by SessI18n.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceXlfKeysForString(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: ReplaceXlfKeysForString - Convert from XlfKeys to "" Cooperating with NotToTranslateStrings

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.IsToBeInXlfKeys(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a key should be included in XlfKeys based on naming rules.
member.param: Key name to check.
member.returns: True if the key should be in XlfKeys.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.sunamoStrings
member.summary: was collection with previously existed properties in SunamoStrings class like Translate.FromKey(XlfKeys.EditUserAccount)

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.removeSessI18nIfLineContains
member.summary: XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormatSunamo.removeSessI18nIfLineContains

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.RemoveSessI18nIfLineContains(System.String)
member.summary: Removes SessI18n references from lines that contain any of the predefined identifiers.
member.param: Text to process.
member.returns: Text with SessI18n removed from matching lines.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.RemoveSessI18nIfLineContains(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: Removes SessI18n calls from lines that contain any of the specified substrings.
member.param: Source text content to process.
Substrings to match against lines; defaults to internal list if null.
member.returns: Processed text with SessI18n removed from matching lines.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.RemoveAllSessI18n(System.String)
member.summary: Removes all SessI18n wrapper calls from the given text content.
member.param: Text content to strip SessI18n calls from.
member.returns: Text with all SessI18n calls removed.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.type
member.summary: Cached type reference for XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceRlDataToSessionI18n(System.String)
member.summary: Replaces RLData resource calls with SessionI18n calls using default parameters.
member.param: Source text to transform.
member.returns: Text with RLData replaced by SessionI18n.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.ReplaceRlDataToSessionI18n(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces resource data calls with session i18n calls in the content, converting bracket styles.
member.param: Source content to transform.
Original resource accessor prefix to replace.
New session i18n prefix to use.
member.returns: Content with resource calls replaced.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FileFormats.XmlLocalisationInterchangeFileFormat.Id(System.Xml.Linq.XElement)
member.summary: Gets the id attribute value from an XElement.
member.param: XML element to read the id from.
member.returns: Value of the id attribute.
